message:
fix(planner): update probe_tests IndexInfo fixtures to current struct shape

The planner's IndexInfo struct has evolved (now carries table, n_pages,
source, partial_where, expression_columns and uses `unique` instead of
`is_unique`), and Expr::BinaryOp now requires a `span`. The unit-level
probe_tests fixtures lagged behind and stopped compiling.

Changes, all inside probe_tests in src/lib.rs:
- Two Expr::BinaryOp literals gained span: Span::ZERO
- Two IndexInfo literals:
    is_unique → unique
    removed: expressions
    added:   table, n_pages, source: StatsSource::Heuristic,
             partial_where: None, expression_columns
- Also the single-column BinaryOp in the probe helper (col = int)

Test-only changes; production paths already use the current shape via
CatalogQuery::index_info().
